sources.name: ChartMasters
sources.evidenceSnippet: Fred Again hits 5 billion all-credits Spotify streams on 19 Jan 2025. Lead streams 4B+ noted on 28 Dec 2024.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Marea (we've lost dancing) = 513,866,496 streams. Noted as Fred again..'s #1 most popular track.

sources.name: ChartMasters
sources.evidenceSnippet: Future's Spotify lead streams 29.9B. All-credits streams 53B. Mask Off hit 2B streams on 2026-01-18.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Mask Off: 2,064,563,104 streams. Total artist streams 28,642,552,487.

sources.name: Songstats
sources.evidenceSnippet: Total streams: 155M. 130K monthly listeners on Spotify, 191K followers.

sources.name: Spotify
sources.evidenceSnippet: You: 27,454,659 streams. In My Car: 10,405,828 streams. Plain Sailing: 909,843 streams.

sources.name: ChartMasters
sources.evidenceSnippet: Gorillaz total lead streams: 13,601,399,094. Most streamed track: Feel Good Inc. with 2,372,357,350 streams.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Feel Good Inc. 2,372,357,350 streams. Gorillaz #1 most popular track.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Grandbrothers total streams: 116,668,831. Bloodflow: 32,629,454 streams - top track.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Grimes total streams: 2,683,243,528. Top track: Genesis with 510,684,493 streams. Oblivion: 502,226,325 streams.

sources.name: Songstats
sources.evidenceSnippet: Total streams: 3.16M. 58.2K followers. Top performing track: TERRAIN at 37% popularity.

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: Hania Rani total streams: 227,713,119. Dreamy: 22,990,591 streams - top track. Eden: 18,158,858.

sources.name: Spotify
sources.evidenceSnippet: Frontier: 1,748,610 streams. Monthly listeners: 9,500-10,400. Total catalog estimated from top track and track count (~30 tracks across 3 albums).

sources.name: Research Paper (University of Groningen)
sources.evidenceSnippet: On Herndon's Spotify profile, tracks Frontier and Eternal standing out with over 1,000,000 plays each (2019 data).

sources.name: Kworb
sources.evidenceSnippet: James Blake total streams: 3,266.3M (3,266,300,000). Top track: Retrograde with 222,345,647 streams.

sources.name: TooXclusive
sources.evidenceSnippet: James Blake estimated total Spotify streams: 3.27B. Kings Dead (with Jay Rock, Kendrick Lamar, Future): 679,250,196.
